_readme: Shared excavation state for the discovery loop — read/advance via scripts/rotation.py. Committed so any agent/machine resumes where the last one stopped. History of what is already mined lives in git log + manifest.jsonl.

find_books.note: OAPEN all-language + native-language queries (de/it/fr/es/pt/nl added 07-10); offsets 0-50 mined multilingual, 0-375 English-era. NOT HUNG, just SLOW: 117 QUERIES x ~15-20s/search + a 30s OAI license lookup per candidate = ~45-60min/run, and it prints only at the end. Two rounds mistook that for a hang at offset 375 and skipped it; a 3600s cap ran it fine (offset 375 -> +153 books on 07-16). Give it >=3600s; do NOT retire the English queries.

find_openaire.note: vein nearly dry: p1=300, p2=109, p3=52, p4=22

find_patents.note: weekly buckets 1900..now, walked backwards; mined: 2017-2020 W01, 1925-1940 W01s, 2015-W52..W08 (49 buckets). --countries flag NEW (default US): CN/EP/DE work, sitemap titles are English for all countries; CN buckets 2018-2020 W03 mined 07-10 (license=open for non-US)

find_purdue.note: PAUSED 07-10: docs.lib.purdue.edu serves 202-challenge to all our clients (bepress wall; referer trick fails). 400 pur- rows purged from manifest, entries kept in registry. Retry from different network or headless browser.

find_ibpsa.note: PAUSED — rate-triggered sgcaptcha poisons bulk fetches; needs slow pacing (~1 req/2-3s) before re-enabling; bs series biennial 1985-2025

find_sdz.note: sdz+hdz pages 1-5 mined 07-10 (165 kept), 6-10 mined 07-12 (35+72), 11-15 mined 07-12 (43 sdz; hdz p11 came back EMPTY — series ended earlier than the ~p25 estimate). sdz ends ~p16 — next run p16 likely the last

find_ademe.note: run with --pages 4; categories: 3153-batiment (504 results, mined p1-12), 3149-energies (p1-8), 3509-urbanisme (p1-8); all three still yielding ~80-95/round on 07-12; license=open (non-commercial reuse w/ attribution)

find_kitopen.note: EXHAUSTED 07-10: ddc:690 set fully harvested (9,346 records, ~700 passed CC filter). Other ddc sets (620 engineering?) unexplored.

find_japan.note: nilim 2012-2025 mined (floor 2012); bri reports 139-158 done (new numbers appear at top); --series data (建築研究資料, data.html) walked No.1-217 on 07-17 (+141 appended, ~105 live folders) — re-walk the top numbers occasionally for new releases

find_wiki.note: category mode: depth 1 x cap 250 mined 07-09; depth 2 x cap 400 drained 07-12 (800 capped run + 825 uncapped run < --max 1500 = dry) — advanced to depth 3; expect heavier drift at d3, the gate handles it; langlinks mode saturated; --books zh done

find_patents_cn.note: CN patents (Chinese full text; license=open). Same weekly-bucket walk as find_patents but separate pointer; marathon runs it with --countries CN. Mined: 2018/2019/2020-W03, 2019-W46+W45 (+800 on 07-12).

find_jrc.note: JRC Publications Repository via OpenAIRE datasource filter -> handle page -> OP-DOI (10.2760 etc, cc-by) + bitstream PDF; run with --rows 40 --max 250. First 15 QUERIES dry at p5; second-wave QUERIES added 07-17 (+61 at p1 rows40) — pointer restarted at p2 for the widened set

find_govuk.note: gov.uk Search API (q + filter_content_store_document_type multi-value OR) -> Content API attachments -> assets.publishing.service.gov.uk PDFs; OGL v3 = open; run with --rows 20 --max 250. Wave-1 (18 queries) mined p1-27, thinning (101/250 pruned at p27); wave-2 +14 UK-policy queries added 2026-07-20, pointer RESET to p1 (dedup makes re-walk safe)

find_worldbank.note: World Bank Documents & Reports official API (see find_worldbank.py docstring); run with --rows 50 --pages 8 --max 250. Query 'building energy efficiency' = 16,890 records (os 0-400 mined 07-12, 250 kept — overlap at os 300 is dedup-safe). When it thins, rotate --q: 'energy efficient buildings', 'district heating', 'building code', 'thermal insulation', 'green building construction' — reset next=0 per query. cc-by, junk doctys filtered in-script
